_@—

CHECKMARK PRODUCTION

BLUEPRINT METHOD

[ MODULE 1 STUDENT GUIDE |

Phase 3 & 4: Build the Materials

Phase 3: Build the Sound Palette

e Choose or design your drums, bass, keys, synths, FX, and ambience before the full arrangement.

e The main sounds should feel close to finished so the song is built on strong choices.

e Do not wait until the end to find your core kick, snare, bass, or piano sound.

Prepare the sounds before building the song.

Phase 4: Create the Musical Parts

e Write and record the core musical material: chords, melodies, drums, bass lines, hooks, counter-melodies, and support parts.

e Create alternate versions when helpful: simple, bigger, stripped-down, or final-chorus versions.

_ e Capture ideas first; arrange them later.

rae Create the parts first. Arrange them after. —«» ———— Goal ——— i By the end of this stage, you should have the sounds and musical ingredients needed to build the full song.
